gist.headline: Reimagine your world
gist.blurb: Snap, upload, transform. The new Reimagine mobile app turns your photos into AI art using our models.
gist.summary: Added Reimagine, a React Native mobile app for photo-to-art transformation, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Android users can now use a dedicated app to remix up to 4 images at once into new AI creations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a large smartphone. On the screen, a simple photo is transforming into a colorful painting. The background is a cozy art studio with lime green accents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a large smartphone showing a photo transforming into a painting. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text: 'REIMAGINE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
